lines.speaker: An old Dwarf
lines.text: Why you. Unless you have seen the small village of Falador grow into a heaving city like I have of course!

lines.speaker: An old Dwarf
lines.text: Well then! Enjoy your stay in our mountain home.

sections.title: After the Recipe for Disaster subquest

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How's your son getting on, now that I've rescued him from the time bubble and the culinaromancer?

lines.speaker: Rohak
lines.text: My son's fine. I'm not so sure about you, though. Maybe you should lay down in a dark room until the babbling stops.

lines.speaker: Rohak
lines.text: Aye, I've still got enough ingredients from before, but I'll want 100 coins.

lines.speaker: Rohak
lines.text: I'm not doing it for less, even for a mate.
